query: severely underexposed dark photo crushed shadows black murky
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: exposure extremes — severe underexposure, crushed shadows, dark murky atmosphere, mood-driven black tones

response.objective_caption: A close-up of a person wearing glasses, showing portions of their face and hair against a surrounding dark area.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A close-up portrait under extreme underexposure, where crushed shadows consume most of the frame and leave only fragments of the subject’s face visible. The small illuminated areas reveal a sickly purple color cast, muted desaturated tones, and almost no fine surface detail, producing an oppressive atmosphere with weak separation between light and dark across the entire image.
